sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82964" key="phlo/xutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηλό-χῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moulded of clay</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θάλαμοι</foreign>, of swallows' nests, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
